title: アオハル杯2戦目・花丸届かず！

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nooo! So much for a perfect day!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What did the oracle mean, then? Was our will not
enough to find a way?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hold on... Maybe this is just a pitstop on our way
toward eventual victory!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If so, then we must continue striving toward our
destination! Full speed ahead to the way we must
find!
